series_metadata.series_title: NON-CDL Equipment Pre-Trip Inspection Form (EM-78 SF)
series_metadata.series_description: This form is completed by ODOT users of ODOT owned equipment. The user is responsible for inspecting all applicable items on the equipment and verifying this on the NON-CDL Equipment Pre-Trip Inspection Form (EM-78 SF).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: form 90 days, may be kept longer if needed in a HazMat situation. HazMat situations must be retained released by Chief Legal
